description: Five Nights at F***boy's is an RPG game that contains a lot of crude humor from the mid 2010's, join Freddy F***boy as he begins his night of debauchery.

v0.0.1.description: The game will generate just fine (though you likely will need to pair it with other games since there's a lot of progression locks), but as of now I don't yet have a working game client.
v0.0.1.title: Functional APWorld, no game client just yet
